violations.text: The outside refuse area (off basement) has an accumulation of kegs. PIC stated pickup has been scheduled. Refuse areas must be free from trash, clutter and maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking proper signage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen cooking area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Uncovered containers of food observed in the freezer and refrigerator. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service was called during inspection, and 3 bay sink will be used for sanitizing equipment and utensils until dishwasher is serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150--400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of ethe ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Oil observed stored on the floor beneath a hand sink in the kitchen. Food must be stored in a clean dry location, where it is not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Tongs observed stored on an unclean surface (ansul system pie) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, and basement storeage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:portable fans in kitchenprep unitsrefrigeratorfreezerice machinefryerarea beneath grillscold drawerskitchen shelvescart next to fryerprep table, especially around hardware. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Hand sinks in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue.Plumbing fixtures must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The oil recycling receptacle has an accumulation of grease and debris, both on it and the area beneath. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025

The floors and walls in the kitchen especially in prep area, and beneath the 3 bay sink, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The basement storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, leaves, cobwebs, debris, unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and items. Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025
The ceiling in the basement storage area is unfinished or poor repair, with exposed spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

The screen door near the cooking area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025

The outside area outside the basement storage areas have an accumulation of litter, debris, vegetation, and rocks. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by the drain tray from the bar. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bar were was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025
Uncovered containers of food observed in the freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, mandolin, stacked pans on clean storage rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off, emptied, and bagged ice provided during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Utensils in the bar are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items shall be stored in a clean dry area where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:prep units including gasketscold drawersice machinefryersoven grillsingredient containers in cooking areautensil storage binsportable fanscan opener baserolling racksheet pans used for storage on rolling rackred & green bucketsChest freezers in basement have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The oil recycling receptacle has an accumulation of grease and debris, both on it an on the area beneath.Oil receptacle must be cleaned or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025

The outside area outside the basement storage areas have an accumulation of litter, debris, vegetation, old wood, and rocks. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025
The screen door near the cooking area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer (ice accumulation) in the basement have an accumulation food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The ceiling in the basement area is not covered with a smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (insulation is exposed). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2021
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State procedure provided to establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

Raw animal foods (such as raw fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as salad dressings and pizza shells) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Various prepared foods were observed held past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base and freezer (ice accumulation) in the basement have an accumulation food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Walls near bottom of basement staircase were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024
The ceiling in the basement area is not covered with a smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (insulation is exposed). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2021

The stairs and floors under soda syrup rack in the basement have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
